title: Shaggy's Filipino-Style Rest Pilaf
description: A twist on a classic pilaf, this Filipino-inspired dish combines the flavors of rest and shaggy with the warmth of pilaf.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the chopped rest and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the uncooked pilaf and stir well.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the fish sauce, soy sauce, and chopped shaggy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
